overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a walk through a covered wooden pier into an open waterfront area during golden hour. The scene features NPC workers carrying lumber, historic frontier architecture including a hotel and pavilion, and atmospheric haze over the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden pier walkway with metal roof trusses

events.description: exiting the covered pier structure into open waterfront area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered wooden pier toward the open end and waterfront

entered.detail: metal truss roof structure with wooden supports covering the walkway
white painted wooden railings lining both sides of the pier
ornate wooden terminal building with tower visible at the end of the covered walk
multi-story brick building with multiple windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered wooden pier structure with metal truss roofing. The camera walks forward through the sheltered walkway toward an open area, with wooden railings visible on both sides and a pavilion building visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront pier with ocean view and benches

events.description: emerging from shadow of covered pier into direct golden hour sunlight
reaching the end of the pier and beginning to turn around to face the town

agents.ego_description: walking to the end of the open pier to view the water and distant ship, then turning to survey the area

notable_agents.action: worker standing near the railing looking out at the water

entered.detail: calm ocean water with atmospheric haze and golden sunlight reflection
wooden slatted bench facing the water
ornate black metal street lamp with multiple lanterns
large steamship visible through the haze on the water

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered structure, the scene opens to a wide waterfront pier bathed in golden hour sunlight. The camera walks toward the water's edge, passing benches and street lamps, with a distant steamship visible through the atmospheric haze. The sun creates a warm backlight as the camera reaches the pier end and begins to turn.

scene_state.functional_zone: active pier with construction workers carrying lumber

events.description: encountering group of workers carrying lumber and construction materials

agents.ego_description: walking along the pier passing workers who are carrying wooden planks and construction materials

notable_agents.action: worker carrying a long wooden plank on his shoulder
worker in suspenders lifting and moving lumber piles

entered.detail: tall wooden building with large HOTEL ROOMS painted signage on the facade
stacks of wooden planks and construction lumber on the deck
wooden crates and barrels stacked near the railing

segments.scene_description: Walking back along the open pier, the camera passes through an active work area where NPC workers carry lumber and construction materials. The large Hotel Rooms building dominates the view ahead, with piles of wooden planks and barrels stacked along the right side. The crowd density increases as workers move in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier approach with ornate pavilion building

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the covered pavilion structure at the pier entrance, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in vest and hat carrying a large sack over his shoulder

entered.detail: tall wooden signpost with directional signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach back to the ornate pavilion building with its distinctive tower and wooden architecture. The camera passes wooden barrels and street lamps while a man carrying a sack walks ahead. The hotel and construction materials fall behind as the covered pavilion entrance grows larger in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered wooden walkway into a sun-drenched waterfront and back toward an ornate pavilion. It begins under the metal truss roofing of a covered pier, moving forward through the sheltered passage toward a distant building. As the camera exits the structure, the scene opens into a wide pier bathed in golden hour sunlight, gliding past benches and street lamps toward a steamship veiled in atmospheric haze. The camera then turns and walks back along the open waterfront, passing through an active construction zone where workers carry lumber and barrels beside a large hotel building. Finally, the view shifts away from the industrial activity and toward the distinctive tower of the pavilion, passing a man with a sack as the ornate wooden entrance fills the frame.
